subject: An Eternal Naga warrior — a serpentine undead figure in elaborate Lazotep-plated ceremonial armor with a distinctive fan-shaped headdress, dual-wielding curved blades, coiled in a battlefield mist
description: A mid-to-wide shot of a serpentine figure with a humanoid upper body and a long coiled lower body — clearly a Naga — rendered in muted violet and blue tones consistent with Lazotep preservation. The figure wears an ornate fan-shaped or spread headdress with teal and gold detailing, and is dressed in layered ceremonial armor with a decorated chest piece featuring geometric and circular motifs. Both arms are raised and each hand holds a curved blade — the weapons are clearly visible and legible at this resolution. The lower body coils rest on cracked dark ground. The background is a hazy pink-amber cityscape with towers rising into smoky sky — consistent with a Ravnica district under assault. The flavor text's reference to 'that headdress' confirms the headpiece is a visually significant identifier. The figure's skull-like face and dessicated skin indicate undead Eternal status.
foreground: Naga Eternal with fan headdress, dual curved blades raised, coiled lower body on cracked ground
background: Hazy pink-amber cityscape with towers under smoky sky
emotion: vacant, threatening — undead figure with no visible emotion, weapons raised with mechanical precision
